plugins.name: artemis-transmission-protocol
plugins.description: Structured agent-to-agent communication via the Artemis Transmission Protocol (ATP).

plugins.name: atp-provenance-logging
plugins.description:
Line-item action provenance for ATP agents (parent + child prov_id in agent_logs; 
      halt-and-alert on log failure).

plugins.name: agent-scaffolder
plugins.description:
Scaffold AI agents from an Agent Card; generates system prompts and index.md 
      / AGENTS.md / .codex/instructions.md.

plugins.name: agent-definition
plugins.description:
Define an agent's Agent Card and write it to agents/NAME/AGENTS.md, inheriting parent 
      .agents governance.

plugins.name: project-scaffolder
plugins.description:
Scaffold a project's .agents/ governance frame (instructions.md, index.md, seeded logs/). 
      Stackable and directory-scoped.

plugins.name: ramble-on
plugins.description:
Signal-translation layer: raw brain dumps to structured, 
      voice-preserving output (ATP, platform posts, clean notes).
